highlights.text: Its why I wrote last Tuesday at 4pm (when we were 5880s): “My general lean is that a relief bounce leg began on Monday by testing megaphone support, and is underway.
I was looking for this to break and I wrote last Thursday at 4pm: “For tomorrow, the bull case is that ES is constructing a bull flag.

As readers know, my lean was yes, and I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “ If I had to provide a lean though, its always to defer to momentum: As long bulls can hold 6005 lowest we can 6066, 6074, then 6087.” This played to perfection, and by today, we got to that 6087 target.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a very classic Failed Breakdown (my core setup) we had on last day Thursday which triggered Friday’s squeeze.

post_title: 6 Days Of Upside For SPX. How Much Gas Does It Have Left? Jan 22nd Plan
